question_np: Nepal मा sextortion cases बढ्दैछ। Primary reason?
options_np: Smartphone + social media growth + awareness कम — perfect storm
explanation_np: Sextortion increase: smartphone penetration + social media + low awareness = vulnerability।

question_np: Online gaming addiction fraud connection Nepal?
options_np: In-game purchase fraud, account selling, real money gambling disguise
explanation_np: Gaming fraud: fake in-game items, account hacking, hidden gambling mechanics।

options_np: Prize money fraud, fake tournaments, account hacking — growing issue
explanation_np: E-sports fraud: fake tournaments, prize fraud, account theft। Report organizer + Police।

options_np: Virtual property scams, identity fraud, investment fraud — emerging risk
explanation_np: Metaverse fraud: virtual land/asset scams, identity theft, investment fraud — emerging।

options_np: Crypto, NFT, DeFi scams — awareness needed as adoption grows
explanation_np: Web3 fraud: crypto, NFT rug pulls, DeFi exploits — Nepal adoption growing।

options_np: Code bugs, reentrancy attacks, flash loan attacks — audit required
explanation_np: Smart contract: code audits essential। Known vulnerabilities: reentrancy, overflow, flash loans।

options_np: Never share — permanent crypto loss। Offline storage, hardware wallet
explanation_np: Seed phrase/private key: NEVER share। Loss = permanent fund loss। Offline secure storage।

options_np: Clone websites, fake apps — only established exchanges (Binance, etc.)
explanation_np: Fake exchanges: clone websites, withdrawal restrictions। Only established, regulated exchanges।

options_np: Fake airdrops steal wallet — connect wallet to unknown sites = risk
explanation_np: Airdrop scam: fake free tokens → wallet drain। Never connect wallet to unknown sites।

options_np: Long-term relationship build → crypto investment → drain। Very common
explanation_np: Pig butchering: long relationship build, then crypto 'opportunity' → fund drain। International scam।

options_np: Unauthorized financial services, fake apps — NRB license verify
explanation_np: Fintech fraud: unlicensed services, fake apps। NRB: nrb.org.np licensed fintechs verify।

question_np: Buy Now Pay Later (BNPL) fraud Nepal?
options_np: Emerging — hidden fees, debt trap। Terms carefully read
explanation_np: BNPL Nepal: emerging। Hidden fees, interest rates. Terms carefully read before use।

options_np: Fake borrowers, platform fraud — NRB licensed P2P platforms
explanation_np: P2P lending: borrower fraud, platform scams। NRB licensed platforms मात्र।

options_np: Fake automated investment advice — SEBON licensed only
explanation_np: Robo-advisor: SEBON licensed investment advisors। Fake algorithmic advice = fraud।

options_np: Fake digital insurance, unauthorized — Beema Samiti registered only
explanation_np: Insurtech: Beema Samiti registered digital insurance only। Unauthorized = fraud।

options_np: Regulatory Technology — compliance automation, fraud detection assist
explanation_np: RegTech: technology-driven regulatory compliance। Nepal NRB, SEBON — adoption growing।

options_np: Supervisory Technology — regulators use technology to monitor — NRB tools
explanation_np: Suptech: NRB, SEBON use technology for supervision — real-time monitoring।

options_np: Data sharing ecosystem — fraud risk + financial inclusion benefit
explanation_np: Open finance: broader data sharing। NRB framework developing. Fraud risk management crucial।

options_np: Non-financial apps में financial services — authorization, security critical
explanation_np: Embedded finance: non-financial platforms provide financial services। Authorization/security critical।

options_np: National ID digital form — NID, biometric — fraud resistant potential
explanation_np: Digital identity: NID card digital, biometric verification — identity fraud reduce।
QR merchants: NRB/fonePay registration required। Verification process — fraud reduce।

options_np: F1Soft, Prabhu Pay — NRB licensed payment aggregators
explanation_np: Payment aggregators: F1Soft, Prabhu Pay — NRB licensed। Merchant onboarding verification।

options_np: SSL/TLS encryption, 3DS, tokenization, PCI DSS — comprehensive security
explanation_np: Payment gateway: SSL, 3D Secure, tokenization, PCI DSS compliance — layer security।

options_np: Real-time rules engine + ML models — suspicious transactions flag
explanation_np: Transaction monitoring: rule-based + ML — velocity, amounts, patterns — suspicious flag।
False positive: legitimate = blocked। Trade-off: security vs convenience। Tuning required।
Fraud score: 0-100 transaction risk rating। ML models calculate — real-time decision।

options_np: Browser/device unique identifier — known fraud devices block
explanation_np: Device fingerprinting: browser, device attributes → unique ID. Known fraud devices block।

options_np: Transaction location verify — impossible locations = flag
explanation_np: Geo fraud: Nepal account + transaction from Europe simultaneously = impossible → flag।

options_np: Too many transactions in short time — automated block
explanation_np: Velocity: 10 transactions/minute = suspicious। Automated rules engine block।

options_np: Network relationships map — fraud rings, shell companies identify
explanation_np: Graph analytics: transaction/entity networks → fraud rings, circular transactions identify।

question_np: Nepal को banking system fraud resistance?
options_np: Improving — CBS, core banking, NRB oversight but gaps remain
explanation_np: Nepal banking: improving (CBS, mobile banking) but frauds increasing। NRB strengthening oversight।

options_np: Most banks use CBS — real-time transactions, fraud detection better
explanation_np: CBS: most Nepal banks implement। Real-time processing, better fraud monitoring।

options_np: Nepal Clearing House Ltd — interbank clearing, SWIFT, EFT
explanation_np: NCHL: Nepal Clearing House Ltd। Interbank clearing, RTGS, EFT payments।

options_np: Real Time Gross Settlement — large value interbank transfers
explanation_np: RTGS: Real-Time Gross Settlement। Large value (Rs 1 lakh+) interbank transfers।

options_np: Electronic Fund Transfer — salary, regular payments
explanation_np: EFT: Electronic Fund Transfer। Salary disbursement, regular payment automation।

options_np: International interbank transfers — Nepal banks member
explanation_np: SWIFT: Nepal banks use for international transfers। SWIFT code unique per bank।

options_np: De-risking, fake trade finance — SWIFT controls, compliance
explanation_np: Correspondent banking: fake trade documents, money laundering risk। Compliance critical।

options_np: NRB exploring CBDC — pilot programs discussed
explanation_np: Nepal CBDC: NRB exploring digital rupee। Pilot discussions ongoing।

options_np: Growing — eSewa, Khalti evolving, NRB framework expanding
explanation_np: Mobile money: rapidly growing. NRB framework expanding. Fraud prevention parallel development।

options_np: NRB approved — rural financial access through agents
explanation_np: Agent banking: NRB licensed banks' agents — rural financial inclusion। Fraud risks managed।

options_np: Withdrawal delays, excuses, new investment pressure — red flags
explanation_np: Ponzi collapse: withdrawal delays, excuses, aggressive new investor recruitment — report immediately।

question_np: What to do when you suspect Ponzi?
options_np: Withdraw, report NRB: 1414 + Police, warn others
explanation_np: Ponzi suspicion: withdraw early, NRB: 1414 + Police report, warn friends/family।

options_np: Chit funds, ROSCAs, informal groups — unregistered = risk
explanation_np: Collective investment: registered cooperatives only। Informal groups = high fraud risk।

options_np: Fake projects, fund misuse — platform verify, organizer verify
explanation_np: Crowdfunding: platform reputation, organizer identity, fund use transparency — verify all।

options_np: Fake projects, unregulated — not recognized Nepal। SEBON no framework
explanation_np: ICO: Nepal SEBON framework absent। Most ICOs = high fraud risk। Avoid।

options_np: Unregulated, fake projects, exit scams — comprehensive research required
explanation_np: Token sales: unregulated, rug pull risk. Whitepaper, team, audits, community — thorough research।

options_np: Rug pulls, smart contract hacks, impermanent loss — high risk DeFi
explanation_np: Yield farming: rug pulls, smart contract exploits। Audited protocols only। High risk।

options_np: Rug pull — developers remove liquidity → token worthless
explanation_np: Liquidity pool rug pull: developers remove liquidity → token = zero. Locked liquidity check।

options_np: Algorithmic stablecoin collapse (Luna/UST) — backed stables safer
explanation_np: Stablecoin risk: algorithmic = high risk (Luna collapse). Fiat-backed (USDT/USDC) safer।

options_np: Smart contract audits prevent exploits — reputable audit firms
explanation_np: DeFi audits: Certik, Trail of Bits, Consensys Diligence — smart contract security essential।

question_np: Nepal मा mobile app security best practice?
options_np: Official stores, permissions review, updates, 2FA, antivirus
explanation_np: App security: official stores only, permissions review, updates, 2FA, reputable antivirus।

options_np: Strong PIN/pattern/biometric — basic first line of defense
explanation_np: Screen lock: 6+ digit PIN, strong pattern, biometric — basic phone security।

options_np: Signal, WhatsApp (E2E) — end-to-end encrypted for sensitive info
explanation_np: Encrypted messaging: Signal (strongest), WhatsApp (E2E) — sensitive communications।

options_np: Updated browser + HTTPS check + privacy mode + ad blocker — security layers
explanation_np: Browser security: updated browser, HTTPS verify, private mode, reputable ad blocker।
Secure DNS: Cloudflare (1.1.1.1), Google (8.8.8.8) — malicious domain filtering।

options_np: Router firewall + OS firewall — unauthorized access prevent
explanation_np: Home firewall: router built-in + OS Windows Defender Firewall — basic protection।

options_np: Always change — default passwords = public knowledge = easy hack
explanation_np: IoT default passwords: ALWAYS change immediately. Default = publicly known = easy hack।

options_np: Guest network for IoT/visitors — main network isolate
explanation_np: Guest network: IoT devices, visitors separate। Main network compromise = IoT compromise avoid।

options_np: Attacker intercepts communication — HTTPS, VPN, public WiFi avoid
explanation_np: MITM: attacker intercepts data. HTTPS, VPN on public WiFi, certificate verify।

options_np: Database attack — fake inputs, data theft। Web apps must sanitize inputs
explanation_np: SQL injection: malicious database queries via input fields। Parameterized queries prevent।

options_np: Physical + cyber security — government data, banking data protection
explanation_np: Data center: physical access controls + cyber security। NTA Nepal — national data center।

options_np: Data sovereignty, encryption, access controls — Nepal cloud use growing
explanation_np: Cloud security: data sovereignty, encryption, IAM, regular audits — Nepal adoption growing।

options_np: Never trust, always verify — every access request authenticate
explanation_np: Zero trust: 'Never trust, always verify' — every access request authenticated, authorized।

options_np: Who can access what — authentication, authorization, audit — fraud prevent
explanation_np: IAM: right people, right access, right time. MFA, RBAC, regular access reviews।

options_np: Admin/privileged accounts — extra controls, session recording, approval
explanation_np: PAM: privileged accounts (admin) — extra authentication, session recording, approval workflow।
Security training: quarterly minimum + phishing simulations — ongoing behavior change।

options_np: Fake phishing emails send to employees — who clicks = training needed
explanation_np: Phishing simulation: fake phishing emails → clickers receive immediate training। Effective।

options_np: Detect, contain, investigate, recover, improve — structured response
explanation_np: Incident response: Detect → Contain → Investigate → Recover → Post-mortem improvement।

options_np: Multi-step verification for transfers + phone confirmation + training
explanation_np: BEC prevention: multi-step transfer approval, phone verification, employee training।

options_np: DMARC, DKIM, SPF email authentication — domain impersonation prevent
explanation_np: Domain spoofing: DMARC + DKIM + SPF — email authentication protocols prevent spoofing।
Cyber Bureau Nepal: dedicated cybercrime investigation unit। 1177, cyberbureaunepal.gov.np।

options_np: Complaint → evidence collect → investigation → prosecution — structured process
explanation_np: Cyber investigation: complaint → digital evidence → forensic analysis → prosecution।

options_np: Electronic Transaction Act — digital evidence court admissible
explanation_np: Digital evidence: ETA 2063 — electronic records, digital evidence court admissible।

options_np: ETA: Nepal server, Nepali victim/perpetrator — jurisdiction
explanation_np: Cyber jurisdiction: Nepal ETA — crime in Nepal or against Nepali citizens/entities।
International cybercrime: MLAT (Mutual Legal Assistance Treaties), Interpol channels।
Dark web crime: Cyber Bureau specialist units + Interpol cooperation।

options_np: Do NOT pay — Cyber Bureau: 1177, backup restore, expert help
explanation_np: Ransomware: NEVER pay (encourages more). Cyber Bureau: 1177, restore from backup, expert।

options_np: Privacy Act provisions — affected users notify, regulator inform
explanation_np: Data breach: notify affected users, inform relevant regulator (NRB for banks) — Privacy Act।

options_np: State-sponsored attacks — national security issue। Nepal CERT, Police
explanation_np: Cyber espionage: state-sponsored attacks on critical infrastructure। Nepal CERT + security agencies।

options_np: Banking, power, telecom — special security measures needed
explanation_np: Critical infrastructure: banking (NRB), power (NEA), telecom (NTA) — special cyber protection।

options_np: Deepfakes, voice cloning, chatbot scams — growing threat Nepal
explanation_np: AI fraud: deepfake videos, voice cloning, AI chatbot scams — Nepal increasing threat।

options_np: AI detection tools, artifact analysis, provenance — imperfect but improving
explanation_np: Deepfake detection: AI tools (Deepware, FakeCatcher), artifact analysis — improving।

options_np: Unnatural patterns, contextual questions, callback verify — imperfect detection
explanation_np: Voice fraud: unnatural pauses/patterns, ask unexpected questions, always callback verify।

options_np: AI detectors (GPTZero), writing analysis — imperfect but useful
explanation_np: AI text: detectors available (imperfect). Critical reading, source verification important।

options_np: Personalized scams, fake content, automated fraud — significant risk
explanation_np: Gen AI risk: highly personalized scams, realistic fake content, automated fraud operations।

options_np: Responsible AI use — prevent fraud, not enable. Guidelines needed
explanation_np: AI ethics: use AI to prevent fraud, not enable. Nepal AI policy developing।

options_np: Fake customer service, manipulation, misinformation — awareness needed
explanation_np: LLM fraud: convincing fake customer service, persuasion, misinformation campaigns।

options_np: Future threat: current encryption crack — post-quantum cryptography preparation
explanation_np: Quantum computing: could break current encryption. Post-quantum cryptography — long-term preparation।

options_np: Fingerprint, face — growing. Spoof attacks exist — liveness detection needed
explanation_np: Biometric auth: fingerprint, face, iris — growing Nepal. Liveness detection for spoof prevention।

options_np: FIDO2/WebAuthn — passkeys replacing passwords. Phishing resistant
explanation_np: Passwordless: FIDO2/WebAuthn passkeys — phishing resistant, better UX। Growing adoption।

options_np: Geographic fraud patterns identify — targeted prevention, resource allocation
explanation_np: Fraud mapping: geographic patterns → targeted awareness, law enforcement resource allocation।

options_np: Dashain (retail), Farming season (agri), Monsoon (disaster), Election — patterns
explanation_np: Seasonal fraud: Dashain (fake products), farming (fake inputs), disaster (charity), election।

options_np: Fake products, price gouging, pickpocketing, online deals — extra vigilance
explanation_np: Dashain: fake goods, overpricing, crowded areas pickpocket, fake online deals — vigilance।

options_np: Financial pressure → predatory loans, fraud schemes। Budget plan garna
explanation_np: Festival financial pressure: predatory lenders, get-rich schemes target. Budget plan, legal loans।

options_np: Earthquake/flood: fake relief, building fraud, contractor fraud — vigilance
explanation_np: Disaster fraud: fake relief funds, substandard reconstruction, contractor fraud — report CIAA।

options_np: Fake medicines, PPE fraud, relief scams — vigilance in crisis key
explanation_np: COVID fraud lessons: fake cures/vaccines, PPE fraud, relief scams — crisis = fraud opportunity।

options_np: More fraud — desperation + reduced oversight = perfect storm
explanation_np: Recession fraud: financial desperation + reduced oversight + job loss = fraud increase।

options_np: Digital fraud permanent increase — online fraud normalized
explanation_np: Post-pandemic: digital fraud permanently elevated. Online fraud = new normal। Awareness critical।

options_np: Carbon credits, disaster relief, green investment scams — emerging
explanation_np: Climate fraud: fake carbon credits, disaster relief scams, greenwashing investment। MOFE oversee।

question_np: ठगी सतर्क app बनाउने उद्देश्य के हो?
options_np: Nepal को नागरिकलाई fraud बाट सचेत गराउने र सुरक्षित राख्ने
explanation_np: ठगी सतर्क: Nepal को पहिलो AI-powered fraud awareness app। Every Nepali लाई fraud बाट protect गर्ने।
